description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a visibly weathered and chipped paint surface, indicating significant use or exposure to the elements. The extinguisher features a prominent black hose attached to the side, which is secured by a metal bracket and curves upward toward the nozzle. The top section includes a metal handle and lever mechanism, as well as a visible safety pin and ring for activation. On one side, there is a white instruction label with pictograms and text, providing operational guidance and safety information. The overall form is robust, with a rounded base and a slightly tapered top, typical of portable fire extinguishers found in urban environments. The surface shows a mix of matte and rough textures due to rust and paint wear, giving it a realistic, utilitarian appearance.
description: A weathered red fire extinguisher with a black hose, metal handle, and visible instruction label. The surface is chipped and rusted, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical red body, black hose attached to the side, and the metal handle and lever at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the instruction label, pictograms, and the full length of the black hose secured to the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying extensive paint chipping and rust, with the hose and handle visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the plain, rusted red surface and the handle mechanism, with the hose running along the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: White rectangular instruction label with black and red text and pictograms, located on the front upper section of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached to the side, approximately the length of the cylinder, secured by a bracket and curving upward toward the nozzle.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metal safety pin with a circular ring, located at the top near the handle and lever.
